report.technique: Contrast-enhanced CT of the abdomen and pelvis, portal-venous phase, 5 mm reconstructions.
report.findings: Liver: homogeneous, no focal lesion. Gallbladder: no stones, normal wall. Pancreas: normal. Spleen: normal size. Kidneys: no hydronephrosis or stone. Bowel: normal calibre, no obstruction; appendix not clearly seen. Vasculature: aorta normal calibre. Bones: no aggressive lesion.
report.impression:
1. No acute intra-abdominal process identified.
2. Appendix not visualised — clinical correlation.
